title: Update an Asset Group
content:
Use this endpoint to update assets, members or the name of an Asset Group. You need to be an Admin user of the Business Center. # Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/asset_group/update/ **Method** POST **Header** ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |Access-Token{Required}|string|Authorized access token. For details, see [Authentication](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738373164380162).| |Content-Type{Required}|string|The content type of the request.
Allowed value: `"application/json"`. | ``` **Parameters** ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |bc_id {Required} | string | Business Center ID. | |asset_group_id {Required} | string | ID of the Asset Group you want to update.| |update_entity {Required} | string | The entity that you want to update. Enum values: `ASSET`, `MEMBER`, `NAME`.| | asset_group_name {+Conditional} | string | Asset Group name. Required when the `update_entity` is `NAME`. | | action {+Conditional} | string | Type of action to be performed. Enum values: `ADD`, `DELETE`. Required when the `update_entity` is `ASSET` or `MEMBER`. | | assets {+Conditional} | object[] | Asset information. Max size is 200. Required when the `update_entity` is `ASSET`.| #| asset_id | string| Asset ID. When the asset type (`asset_type`) is `ADVERTISER`, this is the advertiser ID. | #| asset_type| string | Asset type. Currently, the only supported type is `ADVERTISER`. You don't have to specify this field since `ADVERTISER` is used by default.| | members {+Conditional} | object[] |Member information. Max size is 50. Required when the `update_entity` is `MEMBER`.| #| member_id | string| Member ID. | #| asset_roles | map < string, string>| The roles you want to assign to the member according to the asset type.
Key: Asset type. Enum value: `ADVERTISER`.
Value: Assigned role. Enum values:
  • `ADVERTISER_ROLE_ADMIN`:
    Manage ad accounts: Control ad account settings, finances and permissions.
    Manage campaigns: Create and edit ads.
    View performance: Access reports and view ads.
  • `ADVERTISER_ROLE_OPERATOR`:
    Manage campaigns: Create and edit ads.
    View performance: Access reports and view ads.
  • `ADVERTISER_ROLE_ANALYST`:
    View performance: Access reports and view ads.
Default value: `"ADVERTISER: ADVERTISER_ROLE_ADMIN"`. ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --location --request GET https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/invoice/get/?bc_id={{bc_id}}&invoice_types=["CREDIT"]&page_size=50 --header 'Access-Token: {{Access-Token}}' \ --header 'Content-Type: application/json' (/code) ``` # Response ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |code |number | Response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |message |string | Response message. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |data |object| Returned data. | |request_id|string|The log ID of the request, which uniquely identifies a request. | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "code": 0, "message": "OK", "request_id": "{{request_id}}", "data": { "list": [ { "account_name": "{{account_name}}", "address": "{{address}}", "amount_excluding_tax": 293.5, "status": "APPROVED", "amount": 293.5, "positive_invoice_ids": [ { "invoice_id": "{{invoice_id}}", "serial_number": "{{serial_number}}" } ], "country_code": "VG", "invoice_type": "CREDIT", "invoice_id": "{{invoice_id}}", "serial_number": "{{serial_number}}-CN", "invoice_title": "{{account_name}}", "currency_code": "USD", "unpaid_amount": 293.5, "emails": [ "{{email}}", "{{email}}" ], "billing_group_id": "{{billing_group_id}}", "entity_serials": [ "{{entity_serial}}" ] }, { "account_name": "{{account_name}}", "address": "{{address}}", "amount_excluding_tax": 179, "status": "APPROVED", "amount": 179, "positive_invoice_ids": [ { "invoice_id": "{{invoice_id}}", "serial_number": "{{serial_number}}" } ], "country_code": "VG", "invoice_type": "CREDIT", "invoice_id": "{{invoice_id}}", "serial_number": "{{serial_number}}-CN", "invoice_title": "{{account_name}}", "currency_code": "USD", "unpaid_amount": 179, "emails": [ "{{email}}", "{{email}}" ], "billing_group_id": "{{billing_group_id}}", "entity_serials": [ "{{entity_serial}}" ] } ], "page_info": { "page": 1, "page_size": 50, "total_page": 1, "total_number": 8 } } } (/code) ```
